failed_cases.description: Defaults are visible through attribute, item, dotted get, exists, and as_dict.
failed_cases.test_code:
import json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'database': {'host':'localhost', 'port': 5432}, 'debug': False})
print(s.database.host)
print(s['DATABASE.PORT'])
print(s.get('database.host'))
print(s.exists('debug'), s.exists('missing'))
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True))
failed_cases.stderr:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "C:\Users\12547\AppData\Local\Temp\tmpj21n_7ki\case.py", line 4, in <module>
    print(s.database.host)
          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
AttributeError: 'dict' object has no attribute 'host'

failed_cases.description: Later secrets files override earlier secrets files.
failed_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
p1=d/'a.json'; p2=d/'b.json'
p1.write_text('{"token":"old", "keep":"yes"}', encoding='utf-8')
p2.write_text('{"token":"new"}', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(secrets_files=[p1,p2])
print(s.token, s.keep)

failed_cases.description: Automatic casts handle booleans, numbers, none, lists, and dictionaries.
failed_cases.test_code:
import os, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
os.environ['APP_BOOL']='true'; os.environ['APP_INT']='7'; os.environ['APP_FLOAT']='1.5'; os.environ['APP_NONE']='null'; os.environ['APP_LIST']='[1,2]'; os.environ['APP_DICT']='{"a":1}'
s = MiniDynaconf(envvar_prefix='APP')
print(type(s.bool).__name__, s.bool)
print(type(s.int).__name__, s.int)
print(type(s.float).__name__, s.float)
print(s.none is None, s.list, json.dumps(s.get('dict'), sort_keys=True))

failed_cases.description: Explicit cast tokens override automatic casting.
failed_cases.test_code:
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={})
s.set('a', '@int 5')
s.set('b', '@str 5')
s.set('c', '@json {"x": 1}')
s.set('d', '@none null')
print(type(s.a).__name__, s.a)
print(type(s.b).__name__, s.b)
print(s.c.x, s.d is None)
failed_cases.stderr:

AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'x'

failed_cases.description: Invalid explicit casts raise SettingsError without changing prior values.
failed_cases.test_code:
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, SettingsError
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'a': 1})
try:
    s.set('a', '@int nope')
except SettingsError:
    print('cast-error')
print(s.a)

failed_cases.description: reload drops ad hoc runtime assignments while configure reloads new files.
failed_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
p1=d/'a.json'; p2=d/'b.json'
p1.write_text('{"name":"one"}', encoding='utf-8')
p2.write_text('{"name":"two"}', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=p1)
s.set('runtime', 'x')
s.reload()
print(s.name, s.exists('runtime'))
s.configure(settings_files=p2)
print(s.name)

failed_cases.description: Files, env, and secrets merge by priority; env text is cast before validation.

from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
f=d/'settings.json'; sec=d/'secrets.json'
f.write_text('{"database":{"host":"file","port":1000},"debug":false}', encoding='utf-8')
sec.write_text('{"database":{"password":"secret"}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['APP_DATABASE__PORT']='5432'
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=f, secrets_files=sec, validators=[Validator('database.port', is_type_of=int, gt=1000)])

all_cases.description: Public classes import and construct.
all_cases.test_code:
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator, ValidationError, SettingsError
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'name':'app'})
print(type(s).__name__)
print(Validator('name').name)
print(issubclass(ValidationError, Exception), issubclass(SettingsError, Exception))

print(s.database.host)
print(s['DATABASE.PORT'])
print(s.get('database.host'))
print(s.exists('debug'), s.exists('missing'))
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True))

all_cases.description: set, update, delete, and deep-copy as_dict operate on dotted keys.
all_cases.test_code:
import json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'a': {'b': 1}})
s.set('a.c', '2')
s.update({'a': {'d': 3}})
d = s.as_dict(); d['A']['B'] = 99
print(s.get('a.b'), s.get('a.c'), s.get('a.d'))
print(s.delete('a.c'), s.exists('a.c'))
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True))

all_cases.description: Later secrets files override earlier secrets files.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
p1=d/'a.json'; p2=d/'b.json'
p1.write_text('{"token":"old", "keep":"yes"}', encoding='utf-8')
p2.write_text('{"token":"new"}', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(secrets_files=[p1,p2])
print(s.token, s.keep)

all_cases.description: Automatic casts handle booleans, numbers, none, lists, and dictionaries.
all_cases.test_code:
import os, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
os.environ['APP_BOOL']='true'; os.environ['APP_INT']='7'; os.environ['APP_FLOAT']='1.5'; os.environ['APP_NONE']='null'; os.environ['APP_LIST']='[1,2]'; os.environ['APP_DICT']='{"a":1}'
s = MiniDynaconf(envvar_prefix='APP')
print(type(s.bool).__name__, s.bool)
print(type(s.int).__name__, s.int)
print(type(s.float).__name__, s.float)
print(s.none is None, s.list, json.dumps(s.get('dict'), sort_keys=True))

s.validate()
print('valid')

all_cases.description: Malformed later file raises SettingsError without corrupting existing state.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, SettingsError
d=pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
bad=d/'bad.json'
bad.write_text('{not-json', encoding='utf-8')
s=MiniDynaconf(defaults={'name':'ok'})
try:
    s.load_file(bad, silent=False)
except SettingsError:
    print('bad-file')
print(s.name)

all_cases.description: Validator defaults become part of the final shared namespace and can be used by later runtime operations.
all_cases.test_code:
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator
s=MiniDynaconf(defaults={'name':'app'}, validators=[Validator('database.port', default=5432, is_type_of=int)])
print(s.database.port)
s.set('database.host', 'db')
print(s.database.host, s.database.port)

all_cases.description: Falsey values from mixed sources are existing settings, not missing settings.
all_cases.test_code:
import os, pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d=pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
f=d/'s.json'
f.write_text('{"empty":"", "items": []}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['APP_ZERO']='0'; os.environ['APP_FLAG']='false'
s=MiniDynaconf(settings_files=f)
print(s.exists('empty'), repr(s.empty))
print(s.exists('items'), s.items)
print(s.exists('zero'), s.zero)
print(s.exists('flag'), s.flag)
